subject: physics
title: 19M.1.HL.TZ1.40
question_html:
A particle is confined within a nucleus. What is the order of magnitude of the uncertainty in the momentum of the particle?

A. 10–10 N s

B. 10–15 N s

C. 10–20 N s

D. 10–25 N s
examiners_html: Response B was an effective distractor for over a third of candidates.
